LanguageData.PawnDiaryPowerfulAiBridge.Settings.Missi: Powerful AI Integration is not active, so this bridge is idle.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryPowerfulAiBridge.Settings.Mode: How Powerful AI personas shape Pawn Diary psychotypes:
Do not synchronize personas. Any psychotype override previously owned by this bridge is removed.
Copy the complete semantic persona text into a reversible bridge-owned Pawn Diary psychotype. No LLM request is used.
Ask a configured Pawn Diary model to turn the same persona into a concise diary outlook. Falls back to the direct text if the request is unavailable or fails.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryPowerfulAiBridge.Settings.NoLan: No active Pawn Diary LLM lane is configured. LLM-assisted mode will use direct text until one is available.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryPowerfulAiBridge.Settings.DataS: The request contains only PAI's nonblank persona, speech-habit, story-role, character-prompt, and persona-preset text. It does not include pawn names, dialogue history, memories, diary entries, or API credentials.
